requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — General Luminaire (KUCAS + GSO IEC 60598-1)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——通用灯具（KUCAS + GSO IEC 60598-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——通用燈具（KUCAS + GSO IEC 60598-1）

summary.en: LED luminaires entering Kuwait must demonstrate electrical safety as part of the mandatory KUCAS (Kuwait Conformity Assurance Scheme), administered by PAI (Public Authority for Industry). The applicable safety standard is the GSO adoption of IEC 60598-1 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), applied within the GSO framework that Kuwait follows. Covered objectives include protection against electric shock (creepage and clearance, insulation, touch current), thermal endurance, mechanical strength, and terminals. Products must be rated for the Kuwait grid of 240 V, 50 Hz. Conformity is normally shown through a KUCAS Technical Evaluation Report leading to a Certificate of Conformity issued before customs clearance at Shuwaikh or Shuaiba; a registered in-country importer is required as the legal entry party.
summary.zh: 进入科威特的 LED 灯具须作为强制性 KUCAS（科威特符合性保证计划，由公共工业局 PAI 管理）的一部分证明电气安全。适用安全标准为 GSO 采用的 IEC 60598-1（灯具——第 1 部分：通用要求和试验），在科威特遵循的 GSO 框架内适用。涵盖目标包括防触电（爬电距离与电气间隙、绝缘、接触电流）、热耐久性、机械强度及接线端子。产品须按科威特电网 240 V、50 Hz 定额。符合性通常通过 KUCAS 技术评估报告证明，并据此在舒韦赫或舒艾巴港口清关前签发符合性证书；须有注册的本地进口商作为合法准入主体。
summary.zht: 進入科威特的 LED 燈具須作為強制性 KUCAS（科威特符合性保證計劃，由公共工業局 PAI 管理）的一部分證明電氣安全。適用安全標準為 GSO 採用的 IEC 60598-1（燈具——第 1 部分：通用要求和試驗），在科威特遵循的 GSO 框架內適用。涵蓋目標包括防觸電（爬電距離與電氣間隙、絕緣、接觸電流）、熱耐久性、機械強度及接線端子。產品須按科威特電網 240 V、50 Hz 定額。符合性通常通過 KUCAS 技術評估報告證明，並據此在舒韋赫或舒艾巴港口清關前簽發符合性證書；須有註冊的本地進口商作為合法准入主體。

standards_or_laws: KUCAS — Kuwait Conformity Assurance Scheme (PAI / Public Authority for Industry)
GSO IEC 60598-1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (GSO adoption of IEC 60598-1)

summary.en: China's current general luminaire safety standard is GB/T 7000.1-2023 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), replacing GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026, with the designation changing from mandatory GB to recommended GB/T. CCC obligations for in-scope luminaires remain governed by the applicable CNCA rules rather than by the GB/T designation alone. CCC testing is conducted by CNCA-authorized laboratories at China's 220 V, 50 Hz grid. Chinese CCC reports under GB 7000.1 are not by themselves accepted for KUCAS conformity.
summary.zh: 中国现行通用灯具安全标准为 GB/T 7000.1-2023（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015，标准属性由强制性 GB 调整为推荐性 GB/T。范围内灯具的 CCC 义务仍由适用的 CNCA 规则决定，而非仅由 GB/T 标识决定。CCC 检测由 CNCA 授权实验室在中国 220 V、50 Hz 电网下进行。GB 7000.1 下的中国 CCC 报告本身不被 KUCAS 符合性所接受。
summary.zht: 中國現行通用燈具安全標準為 GB/T 7000.1-2023（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015，標準屬性由強制性 GB 調整為推薦性 GB/T。範圍內燈具的 CCC 義務仍由適用的 CNCA 規則決定，而非僅由 GB/T 標識決定。CCC 檢測由 CNCA 授權實驗室在中國 220 V、50 Hz 電網下進行。GB 7000.1 下的中國 CCC 報告本身不被 KUCAS 符合性所接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7000.1-2023 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (replaces GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires

gap.en: GSO IEC 60598-1 and GB 7000.1 share a common IEC 60598-1 base, so the core safety tests are broadly aligned. The practical gaps are: (1) Kuwait requires conformity demonstrated through the KUCAS scheme (Technical Evaluation Report plus per-shipment Certificate of Conformity), which is a third-party shipment-linked process with no Chinese equivalent — CCC reports cannot be reused directly; (2) products must be rated and verified for 240 V, 50 Hz rather than China's 220 V — the 50 Hz frequency matches, but the higher nominal voltage must be confirmed for insulation coordination, creepage/clearance and driver rating; (3) a registered Kuwaiti in-country importer must act as the legal entry party; (4) documentation and marking must satisfy GSO/PAI requirements, not CCC marking. Manufacturers should obtain GSO IEC 60598-1 test evidence (commonly via an accredited lab whose reports are accepted by PAI) and process the goods through a recognised KUCAS conformity body before shipment.
gap.zh: GSO IEC 60598-1 与 GB 7000.1 同以 IEC 60598-1 为基础，核心安全试验基本一致。实际差距：（1）科威特要求通过 KUCAS 计划证明符合性（技术评估报告加逐批符合性证书），这是与货运挂钩的第三方流程，无中国对应——CCC 报告不可直接复用；（2）产品须按 240 V、50 Hz 定额并验证，而非中国的 220 V——50 Hz 频率一致，但须就绝缘配合、爬电距离/电气间隙及驱动器定额确认更高的标称电压；（3）须由注册的科威特本地进口商作为合法准入主体；（4）文件及标志须满足 GSO/PAI 要求，而非 CCC 标志。制造商应取得 GSO IEC 60598-1 检测证据（通常通过其报告为 PAI 所接受的认可实验室），并在出货前通过认可的 KUCAS 合格评定机构办理货物手续。
gap.zht: GSO IEC 60598-1 與 GB 7000.1 同以 IEC 60598-1 為基礎，核心安全試驗基本一致。實際差距：（1）科威特要求通過 KUCAS 計劃證明符合性（技術評估報告加逐批符合性證書），這是與貨運掛鈎的第三方流程，無中國對應——CCC 報告不可直接複用；（2）產品須按 240 V、50 Hz 定額並驗證，而非中國的 220 V——50 Hz 頻率一致，但須就絕緣配合、爬電距離/電氣間隙及驅動器定額確認更高的標稱電壓；（3）須由註冊的科威特本地進口商作為合法准入主體；（4）文件及標誌須滿足 GSO/PAI 要求，而非 CCC 標誌。製造商應取得 GSO IEC 60598-1 檢測證據（通常通過其報告為 PAI 所接受的認可實驗室），並在出貨前通過認可的 KUCAS 合格評定機構辦理貨物手續。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — electrical safety to GSO IEC 60598-1 required under KUCAS before Kuwait market entry; KUCAS Certificate of Conformity required per shipment via PAI
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory where the luminaire remains within CNCA-C10-01 scope; the general luminaire safety standard changed from mandatory GB 7000.1-2015 to recommended GB/T 7000.1-2023 from 1 January 2026

source.publisher: PAI — Public Authority for Industry, Kuwait (KUCAS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires entering Kuwait must demonstrate electrical safety to GSO IEC 60598-1 within the mandatory KUCAS scheme administered by PAI, with a per-shipment Certificate of Conformity issued before port clearance. The standard shares an IEC 60598-1 base with China's GB 7000.1, so test content is broadly comparable, but CCC reports do not by themselves satisfy KUCAS and products must be rated for 240 V, 50 Hz. A registered in-country Kuwaiti importer is required as the legal entry party. Verify the current KUCAS product list and accepted test-lab scope with PAI before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入科威特的 LED 灯具须在由 PAI 管理的强制性 KUCAS 计划内按 GSO IEC 60598-1 证明电气安全，并在港口清关前签发逐批符合性证书。该标准与中国 GB 7000.1 同以 IEC 60598-1 为基础，检测内容大致相当，但 CCC 报告本身不满足 KUCAS，且产品须按 240 V、50 Hz 定额。须有注册的科威特本地进口商作为合法准入主体。出货前请向 PAI 核查现行 KUCAS 产品清单及认可的检测实验室范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入科威特的 LED 燈具須在由 PAI 管理的強制性 KUCAS 計劃內按 GSO IEC 60598-1 證明電氣安全，並在港口清關前簽發逐批符合性證書。該標準與中國 GB 7000.1 同以 IEC 60598-1 為基礎，檢測內容大致相當，但 CCC 報告本身不滿足 KUCAS，且產品須按 240 V、50 Hz 定額。須有註冊的科威特本地進口商作為合法准入主體。出貨前請向 PAI 核查現行 KUCAS 產品清單及認可的檢測實驗室範圍。

requirement_topic.en: Self-Ballasted LED Lamp / LED Module Safety (KUCAS + GSO IEC 62560 / 61347-2-13)
requirement_topic.zh: 自镇流 LED 灯 / LED 模块安全（KUCAS + GSO IEC 62560 / 61347-2-13）
requirement_topic.zht: 自鎮流 LED 燈 / LED 模組安全（KUCAS + GSO IEC 62560 / 61347-2-13）

summary.en: Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting (e.g. retrofit LED bulbs) entering Kuwait must meet the GSO adoption of IEC 62560 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services with supply voltages greater than 50 V — Safety specifications) within the mandatory KUCAS scheme. Where a separate LED driver / control gear is supplied, the GSO adoption of IEC 61347-2-13 (Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules) applies. Products must be rated for 240 V, 50 Hz. As with luminaires, conformity is demonstrated through a KUCAS Technical Evaluation Report and a per-shipment Certificate of Conformity issued by a PAI-recognised conformity body, with a registered Kuwaiti importer.
summary.zh: 进入科威特的通用照明用自镇流 LED 灯（如改造型 LED 灯泡）须在强制性 KUCAS 计划内满足 GSO 采用的 IEC 62560（电源电压大于 50 V 的通用照明用自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求）。若另行提供独立的 LED 驱动器/控制装置，则适用 GSO 采用的 IEC 61347-2-13（直流或交流供电的 LED 模块用电子控制装置的特殊要求）。产品须按 240 V、50 Hz 定额。与灯具相同，符合性通过 KUCAS 技术评估报告及由 PAI 认可的合格评定机构签发的逐批符合性证书证明，并须有注册的科威特进口商。
summary.zht: 進入科威特的通用照明用自鎮流 LED 燈（如改造型 LED 燈泡）須在強制性 KUCAS 計劃內滿足 GSO 採用的 IEC 62560（電源電壓大於 50 V 的通用照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求）。若另行提供獨立的 LED 驅動器/控制裝置，則適用 GSO 採用的 IEC 61347-2-13（直流或交流供電的 LED 模組用電子控制裝置的特殊要求）。產品須按 240 V、50 Hz 定額。與燈具相同，符合性通過 KUCAS 技術評估報告及由 PAI 認可的合格評定機構簽發的逐批符合性證書證明，並須有註冊的科威特進口商。

standards_or_laws: GSO IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services (> 50 V) — Safety specifications
GSO IEC 61347-2-13 — Lamp controlgear — Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules

summary.en: China's equivalents are GB 24906-2010 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services with supply voltages > 50 V — Safety requirements), aligned with IEC 62560, and GB 19510.14-2014 (control gear for LED modules), aligned with IEC 61347-2-13. CCC certification may be required for self-ballasted LED lamps and certain LED drivers sold in the Chinese residential market, tested at China's 220 V, 50 Hz. Chinese CCC test reports under GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 are not by themselves accepted for KUCAS conformity.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 24906-2010（电源电压大于 50 V 的普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求），与 IEC 62560 对齐；以及 GB 19510.14-2014（LED 模块控制装置），与 IEC 61347-2-13 对齐。在中国居民市场销售的自镇流 LED 灯及部分 LED 驱动器可能须取得 CCC 认证，并在中国 220 V、50 Hz 下检测。GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 下的中国 CCC 检测报告本身不被 KUCAS 符合性所接受。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 24906-2010（電源電壓大於 50 V 的普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求），與 IEC 62560 對齊；以及 GB 19510.14-2014（LED 模組控制裝置），與 IEC 61347-2-13 對齊。在中國居民市場銷售的自鎮流 LED 燈及部分 LED 驅動器可能須取得 CCC 認證，並在中國 220 V、50 Hz 下檢測。GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 下的中國 CCC 檢測報告本身不被 KUCAS 符合性所接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 24906-2010 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services (> 50 V) — Safety requirements (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 62560)
GB 19510.14-2014 — Control gear for lamps — Particular requirements for electronic controlgear for LED modules (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 61347-2-13)

gap.en: Because GSO IEC 62560 / 61347-2-13 and GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 are all derived from the same IEC base standards, the safety test content is largely harmonized. The gaps are procedural and grid-related: (1) conformity must be routed through KUCAS (Technical Evaluation Report plus per-shipment Certificate of Conformity) via a PAI-recognised body, not CCC; (2) the lamp / driver must be rated and verified at 240 V, 50 Hz — the higher nominal voltage versus China's 220 V affects insulation, dielectric and driver-rating margins even though the 50 Hz frequency is identical; (3) standalone LED drivers shipped separately need their own KUCAS coverage; (4) marking, importer-of-record and documentation must follow GSO/PAI rules. Manufacturers should secure GSO IEC 62560 / 61347-2-13 test evidence from a lab accepted by PAI and verify the current KUCAS product scope for self-ballasted lamps and drivers before shipment.
gap.zh: 由于 GSO IEC 62560 / 61347-2-13 与 GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 均源自相同 IEC 基础标准，安全试验内容基本协调。差距在于程序和电网：（1）符合性须通过 KUCAS（技术评估报告加逐批符合性证书）经 PAI 认可机构办理，而非 CCC；（2）灯/驱动器须按 240 V、50 Hz 定额并验证——相对中国 220 V 更高的标称电压会影响绝缘、介电及驱动器定额余量，尽管 50 Hz 频率一致；（3）单独发运的独立 LED 驱动器须有各自的 KUCAS 覆盖；（4）标志、进口商主体及文件须遵循 GSO/PAI 规则。制造商应从 PAI 接受的实验室取得 GSO IEC 62560 / 61347-2-13 检测证据，并在出货前核实自镇流灯及驱动器的现行 KUCAS 产品范围。
gap.zht: 由於 GSO IEC 62560 / 61347-2-13 與 GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 均源自相同 IEC 基礎標準，安全試驗內容基本協調。差距在於程序和電網：（1）符合性須通過 KUCAS（技術評估報告加逐批符合性證書）經 PAI 認可機構辦理，而非 CCC；（2）燈/驅動器須按 240 V、50 Hz 定額並驗證——相對中國 220 V 更高的標稱電壓會影響絕緣、介電及驅動器定額餘量，儘管 50 Hz 頻率一致；（3）單獨發運的獨立 LED 驅動器須有各自的 KUCAS 覆蓋；（4）標誌、進口商主體及文件須遵循 GSO/PAI 規則。製造商應從 PAI 接受的實驗室取得 GSO IEC 62560 / 61347-2-13 檢測證據，並在出貨前核實自鎮流燈及驅動器的現行 KUCAS 產品範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — self-ballasted LED lamp safety to GSO IEC 62560 (and GSO IEC 61347-2-13 for separate drivers) required under KUCAS; per-shipment Certificate of Conformity via PAI
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where in scope — GB 24906-2010 / GB 19510.14-2014 apply; CCC may be required for self-ballasted lamps and certain LED drivers sold in China

source.publisher: PAI — Public Authority for Industry, Kuwait (KUCAS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Self-ballasted LED lamps and separate LED drivers entering Kuwait must meet the GSO adoptions of IEC 62560 and IEC 61347-2-13 within the mandatory KUCAS scheme, with a per-shipment Certificate of Conformity from a PAI-recognised body. Test content overlaps heavily with China's GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 (shared IEC base), but CCC reports do not by themselves satisfy KUCAS, products must be rated for 240 V, 50 Hz, and standalone drivers need their own coverage. Confirm the current KUCAS product scope and accepted test labs with PAI before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入科威特的自镇流 LED 灯及独立 LED 驱动器须在强制性 KUCAS 计划内满足 GSO 采用的 IEC 62560 及 IEC 61347-2-13，并由 PAI 认可机构出具逐批符合性证书。检测内容与中国 GB 24906 / GB 19510.14（共同 IEC 基础）高度重叠，但 CCC 报告本身不满足 KUCAS，产品须按 240 V、50 Hz 定额，独立驱动器须有各自的覆盖。出货前请向 PAI 确认现行 KUCAS 产品范围及认可的检测实验室。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入科威特的自鎮流 LED 燈及獨立 LED 驅動器須在強制性 KUCAS 計劃內滿足 GSO 採用的 IEC 62560 及 IEC 61347-2-13，並由 PAI 認可機構出具逐批符合性證書。檢測內容與中國 GB 24906 / GB 19510.14（共同 IEC 基礎）高度重疊，但 CCC 報告本身不滿足 KUCAS，產品須按 240 V、50 Hz 定額，獨立驅動器須有各自的覆蓋。出貨前請向 PAI 確認現行 KUCAS 產品範圍及認可的檢測實驗室。
